hero.subtitle: Book your scooter in minutes. Daily, weekly and monthly plans. Modern fleet, 24h support and full coverage.

items.title: Book in Minutes.
items.body: No licence? No problem. Choose, confirm and ride. Zero bureaucracy.

items.title: Electric Fleet. Zero Fuel.
items.body: Electric scooters. No fuel, no licence, zero emissions. Always serviced.

items.title: Plans that Fit Your Budget.
items.body: Daily, weekly or monthly. Cash only. No hidden fees.

items.title: Private Driver. 24 Hours.
items.body: Door-to-door comfort with a dedicated chauffeur. Any time, any destination.

steps.title: Visit our store
steps.body: Come to our store and choose your favourite model in person. Our team will guide you.

steps.title: Select the period
steps.body: Set the pick-up and return dates. Daily, weekly or monthly plans.

steps.title: Pay: cash or bank transfer
steps.body: We accept cash or direct bank account transfer. No cards or digital wallets.

steps.title: Pick up your bike
steps.body: Show your ID and pick up the bike at the agreed address. Off you go.

need.title: Passport photo
need.body: Just send us a photo of your passport. No driver's licence required.

need.title: Cash or bank transfer
need.body: We accept cash or direct bank account transfer only. No cards accepted.

items.title: No licence required
items.body: Scooters can be ridden without a driving licence. Perfect for tourists and beginners.

items.title: Zero fuel costs
items.body: Our electric fleet is fully charged and ready. No petrol bills, ever.

items.title: 100% eco-friendly
items.body: Zero emissions, zero noise. Explore the city and respect the planet.

items.title: Most economical option
items.body: Far cheaper than taxis and car rental. Maximum savings, zero compromise.

fleet.heading: Bikes for Every Style
fleet.intro: A modern, fully-electric VinFast fleet — serviced, charged and ready to ride.

price.heading: Flexible Plans, No Surprises
price.intro: Pick the model and the period that suit your trip. Helmet and 24h support always included.
price.disclaimer: Prices are illustrative and may differ from the live store. Contact us for the latest rates.
price.payment_body: We accept cash or direct bank account transfer. No cards accepted.

faq.q: Do I need a driving licence?
faq.a: No. Our electric scooters require no licence — tourists welcome.
Cash or direct bank transfer only. No cards or digital wallets.
Yes, a certified helmet is included with every rental.

faq.q: Can I swap or extend my bike?
faq.a: Monthly plans include free maintenance and a bike swap. Just message us.

footer.made_with: Rebuilt as a technical demo. Content adapted from buckbike.com.
